title: Byuert Remote Control Car, 6WD RC Stunt Car with Spray and Light, 360° Rotation and Drift Vehicles, 2.4Ghz Radio Controlled Electric Buggy RC Offroad Toy for Adults and Kids
features: Unleash Your Child's Inner Racer: Our electric remote control stunt car offers a 360° flip, 6-wheel drive, and double motors for maximum speed of up to 10KM/H. Your child will love the thrilling stunts they can perform with this car!
Race with Friends: Our 2.4GHz anti-interference frequency technology allows multiple RC stunt cars to race at the same time, with a remote control distance of up to 50M.
Longer Playtime, More Fun: With 1* 500 mA (3.7V) rechargeable lithium batteries included, our RC car can be used for up to 20 minutes on a single full charge. And it only takes 1.5H to fully charge!

Day or Night, Any Terrain: Our Six-wheeled stunt car features 2 headlights, The rear of the vehicle has a spray function, with red and blue double flashing lights immediately placed you in the cyberpunk atmospherer, making it bright and visible during the day and night. The flexible wheels allow for high speed and better flexibility on any terrain, including land, beach, grass, or wetland.

Quality You Can Trust: Our package includes 1*RC Car, 1*remote control, 1*rechargeable lithium batteries, ,1*charging cable, 1*screwdriver. It's the perfect Christmas or Birthday gift for children, and comes with a 12-month warranty period. Contact us with any questions!
description: Product Description Byuert REMOTE CONTROL CAR FOR KIDS/ADULTS Our RC cars have a cool body that can rotate 360 degrees and the cool design of the six wheels allows the RC car to go up and down hills with ease. Made of safe and durable ABS material, the Byuert RC car has a tough and over-quality body that feels great to the touch and can be played on flat and muddy ground, grassland, steep slopes and even stairs. It keeps working well even when dropped from a height of several metres. Enjoy your parent- child time The Byuert remote control car using the 2.4Ghz high frequency controller, even two or more RC cars can be driven together with no signal interference. Two powerful motors with 6WD, 10KM/H high speed, very flexible to make quick turns and do all kinds of stunts. It will help a lot to train your kids on coordinations between eyes and hands. Battery Information How long does it take to get a full charge? It takes about 1.5-2 hours How many batteries are included in the package? We are only equipped with a 3.7v 500mah rechargeable battery, you also need to buy a separate battery for the RC car (2*AAA) How long can you play after it is fully charged? About 20 minutes, because our remote control car is a 6-wheel drive high-speed operation, will be more power consumption, but 20 minutes for the children is enough play time Packaging Information 1*remote control car 1*remote control 1* USB 1*rechargeable battery 1*A bottle uesd to add water mist Instruction manual Why should you choose Byuert RC car? Our remote control car is not only suitable for children over 6 years old to play, but also very suitable for adults to play, and will not feel bored Our remote control car with red and blue double flashing lights with a cool body, so that children feel more cool and fun, having a cool remote control car is every child's dream! Simple and easy to operate the remote control function, follow the product manual operation is very simple and easy to understand, you can easily achieve the body rotation, forward and backward, the front wheel front swing arm, front wheel rear swing arm action The back of the car also has a spray function, just use our bottle to add water to the body and you're good to go!
